title: Aodaer Colorful Paper Plates 60 Pcs 7" Party Plates for Dinner and Dessert, Disposable Plate Tableware for DIY Holiday Wedding Birthday Graduation Party Decorations, Multi-Color (6 Colors)
features: Sufficient quantity: you will get 60 packs of colorful paper plates in 6 different colors, including red, orange, yellow, green, sky blue and purple, 10 packs of each color, abundant colors and enough quantity to satisfy your party requirements and daily needs

Reliable material: these disposable plates tableware are made from recyclable environmentally friendly paper, sanitary and odorless, thick and not easy to deform, the plates are easy to clean up and keep your tables clean, so that you will have more party time with family and friends

Proper size: each party paper plates measures about 7 inches/17.8 cm in diameter, ideal size for various parties, wonderful addition for holding all kinds of food, snacks, candy and so on; the colorful design can create a cheerful and vibrant atmosphere

DIY creation: these paper plates comes in colorful design, which can be used to make interesting crafts, which can develop hands-on skills and stimulate imagination and creativity, these DIY creations can used as lovley decorations at home or party, enjoying funny DIY time

Wide range of use: these bright colorful paper plates are ideal choice for various occasions, such as themed parties, graduation parties, weddings, birthday parties, anniversaries, barbecues, etc, lending your party more joy, leaving unforgettable memories
description: Product Description 60 Pack Colorful Paper Plates Colorful paper plates offer a wide range of color choices, making dining more fun and lively. Different colors can be used for different themed parties, celebrations, or holiday gatherings. In addition to serving food, colorful paper plates can also be used as decorative items. You can draw, write, or attach greeting cards on them, adding fun and personal touch to gatherings or special occasions. Ideal Size Measures about 7 inches/17.8 cm in diameter, convenient to hold all kinds of food, snacks, candy and so on. Quality Material Made from paper materials, reducing the impact on the environment, giving you a comfortable and safe dining experience. Nice Party Supplies Whether it's a birthday party, baby shower, or holiday gathering, these plates add a festive touch to the event.
